LightningComponentBundle.description: Shows users who have read, write, or delete access to the current record and why.

property.name: compactLayout
property.label: Legacy Layout Toggle (Ignored)
property.description: Legacy property retained for existing Lightning pages. The component now always uses a compact layout.

property.name: compactSize
property.label: Layout
property.description: Choose between Compact Layout and Compact Small layout.
